body: AI-powered tools, infrastructure, and automation for teams that build.
One platform. One assistant. Everything connected.
Press the red button to begin.
Red is your universal AI assistant. Red lives on every redbtn app and controls the entire stack through conversation.
Build automations. Deploy apps. Create documents. Manage infrastructure. Provision servers. All by talking to Red.
Red runs redbtn graphs — each app gets its own AI with custom tools, prompts, and APIs. Red knows all. Red gets it done now.
Double-tap the red button to say hi.
The graph-based AI engine that powers Red and everything else. Config-driven graphs, nodes, and neurons — powered by LangChain and LangGraph.
Define workflows as directed graphs. Each node runs steps: LLM calls, API connections, data transforms, conditional routing. No code changes needed — just update configs.
Parallel execution, fan-out/fan-in, conditional branching, loop steps, MCP tool integration, OAuth connections, and memory — all built in.
Start building at app.redbtn.io.
Business productivity apps, each with Red built in. Documents, notes, meetings, signatures, contacts — all AI-native.
Every app connects to the redbtn graph engine. Red can help you inside each one — creating content, scheduling meetings, managing contacts, or drafting agreements.
Explore the suite.
A document and presentation builder with AI assistance. Create decks, reports, and proposals with Red guiding every step.
Rich editing, templates, export to PDF, and real-time collaboration. Red can draft, format, and refine your content on command.
Build documents smarter with redDoc.
Block-based collaborative notes. Organize ideas, meeting notes, and knowledge bases with a fast, flexible editor.
Drag and drop blocks. Nest pages. Share with your team. Red can summarize, expand, or restructure your notes instantly.
Take notes at note.redbtn.io.
A fast, privacy-first calendar booking tool. Share your link, let people book, keep your schedule in sync.
No fuss. Red can manage your availability, suggest meeting times, and handle rescheduling.
Book meetings at meet.redbtn.io.
Secure, privacy-first e-signatures for contracts and agreements. Send, sign, and manage documents from anywhere.
Red can prepare documents, place signature fields, send reminders, and track completion status.
Sign documents at sign.redbtn.io.
A simple CRM for managing contacts, automating outreach, and tracking relationships.
Red can draft emails, schedule follow-ups, segment contacts, and surface insights from your conversations.
Manage contacts at book.redbtn.io.
A serverless FaaS platform. Deploy anything — apps, APIs, workers, cron jobs — from a Git repo or Docker image.
Automatic builds, zero-downtime deploys, environment variables, logs, and scaling. Connect a repo and push to deploy.
Red can create workspaces, trigger builds, manage environment config, and monitor your deployments.
Ship it at run.redbtn.io.
Compute fleet management. Monitor, provision, and orchestrate your servers from a single dashboard.
Agentless architecture — SSH on-demand, WireGuard mesh networking, real-time health checks, automated provisioning.
Red can verify nodes, run commands, check status, and provision new machines through conversation.
Manage your fleet at fleet.redbtn.io.
Document PII and PHI redaction powered by Microsoft Presidio. Upload documents, detect sensitive data, redact automatically.
Supports PDFs, images, and text files. Custom entity recognition, confidence scoring, and audit trails.
Redact sensitive data with redAct.
Apps and sites built for clients across finance, logistics, music, and design.
Elite Entries — Financial trading and strategy automation.
George Anthony — Financial services and life insurance solutions.
Peak Solutions — 3PL logistics with load boards and real-time tracking.
Bri Nicole — Caribbean artist portfolio and music.
Rose Digital Imaging — Graphic design and branding.
The Progression Fund — Technology-focused investment fund.
